controlNotes: The MG10XUF has a 4-band semi-parametric EQ on channels 1-4 (mono). The High and Low bands are shelving; the High Mid and Low Mid are sweepable bell curves. Turn knobs clockwise to boost, counter-clockwise to cut.

instructionTemplates.openEQ: Find the EQ section on CH {channel} (the 4 knobs labeled Hi, Hi-Mid, Lo-Mid, Lo)
instructionTemplates.enableHPF: Press the HIGH PASS FILTER button on CH {channel} — this activates the 80Hz low-cut
instructionTemplates.setBandFrequency: Turn the {band} FREQUENCY knob to approximately {frequency}Hz
instructionTemplates.saveSettings: No save needed — analog settings are retained by knob position
